inputs.label: Base Pack Weight
inputs.businessContext: Weight of backpack and essential gear (excluding consumables and extra clothing).

inputs.label: Food Weight per Day
inputs.businessContext: Estimated weight of food consumed per person per day.

inputs.label: Water Weight per Day
inputs.businessContext: Weight of water carried per day (1 liter = 1 kg).

inputs.label: Fuel Weight
inputs.businessContext: Total weight of fuel (e.g., gas canister).

inputs.label: Extra Clothing Weight
inputs.businessContext: Weight of extra clothing and layers beyond base clothing.

inputs.label: Trip Duration
inputs.businessContext: Number of days for the backpacking trip.
